title: P2: Wire WorldModel.Predict pre-dispatch and Reconcile post-completion
description: ComputeWorldStateDiff computes actual inventory delta (pre/post dispatch), but expectedGained/expectedLost are populated from ActionOutcome.Effects — which are never populated for async fire-and-forget tools (MineBlock, PlaceBlock, Wander). The LLM evaluator receives observation data but no expectation half. Wire WorldModel.Predict before each dispatch and Reconcile after StatusEvent confirms completion to provide structured expected-vs-actual data for every action type.
